title: sambucus racemosa f. laciniata
intro: Sambucus racemosa f. laciniata is a variant of the elderberry plant, specifically a form of the American elderberry (Sambucus racemosa) characterized by its divided or cut leaves, also known as cut-leaved elderberry. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Sambucus racemosa f. laciniata include reducing symptoms of colds and flu, alleviating sinus congestion, and supporting immune function. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
